Walkscape Walkthrough

Tip of the day
Being overencumbered only slows down your activities, but doesn't affect travel.

Casbrant's Grave

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Namespaces

  • Page
  • Discussion

More

  • More

Page actions

  • Read
  • View source
  • History
  • Purge
Other languages:
  • English

A massive shipwreck lies in the sand. Who knows how long it's been here? Some fish and other creatures have taken it as their home. Colorful underwater plants grow on the shipwreck and around it, creating a spectacular sight.

Casbrant's Grave is a location that can be found in the Syrenthia region.

Keywords

The following keywords apply to this location.

Underwater
Ghostly

Faction

Casbrant's Grave is a member of the following factions:

Syrenthia

Activities

The following activities always available at this location.

Sea fishing (Spear)
Wreck diving

Emergency Activity

These Emergency Activities are only visible if you are missing key items for traveling, and are there to prevent softlocks.

Emergency swim escape

Building

The following buildings can be visited at this location.

Fishing store
Casbrant's Sunken Ship

Routes

The following routes are available at this location.

 Casbrant's Grave 
  Vastalume 
1326 Base Steps1
  Port Skildar 
747 Base Steps1
  1. Requires [3] Diving gear equipped.

Trivia


This page is updated automatically to reflect information in the current game version.
